REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, PLAINTIFF CAN YU, YAN WANG AND SUNWAY FLOOR CABINETS INC.'S HEARING ON PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION, CONSOLIDATE ARBITRATION PROCEEDINGS, AND STAY ACTION PENDING CONCLUSION OF ARBITRATION ISGRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART. TO THE EXTENT THIS MOTION SINCE TO COMPEL ARBITRATION OF THE UNLAWFUL DETAINER ACTION AND CONSOLIDATION WITH UNLAWFUL DETAINER ACTION, THE MOTION IS DENIED AS MOOT. SUMMARY JUDGMENT GRANTED ON NOVEMBER 4, 2016. MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION IN THIS ACTION IS GRANTED. EVEN THOUGH PLAINTIFF FAILED TO EXPLAIN THE 4 MONTH DELAY IN SEEKING TO COMPEL ARBITRATION OF THIS ACTION, DEFENDANTS FAILED TO SHOW ANY PREJUDICE IN THIS ACTION, AS REQUIRED UNDER DOERS V. GOLDEN GATE BRIDGE DIST. (1979) 23 CAL.3D 180 AND SAINT AGNES MEDICAL CENTER V. PACIFICARE OF CALIFORNIA (2003) 31 CAL.4TH 1187. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (501)

Notice Of Hearing On Petition Of Plaintiffs And Cross-Defendants Can Tang Yu, Yan Wang, And Sunway Floors Cabinets Inc. To Compel Arbitration, Consolidate Arbitration Proceedings, And Stay Action Pending Conclusion Of Arbitration
Off Calendar Dec-14-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: PLAINTIFF CAN YU, YAN WANG and SUNWAY FLOOR CABINETS INC.'s Hearing On Petition To Compel Arbitration, Consolidate Arbitration Proceedings, And Stay Action Pending Conclusion Of Arbitration isGRANTED in part and DENIED in part. To the extent this motion since to compel arbitration of the unlawful detainer action and consolidation with unlawful detainer action, the motion is DENIED as moot. Summary judgment granted on November 4, 2016. Motion to compel arbitration in this action is GRANTED. Even though Plaintiff failed to explain the 4 month delay in seeking to compel arbitration of this action, Defendants failed to show any prejudice in this action, as required under Doers v. Golden Gate Bridge Dist. (1979) 23 Cal.3d 180 and Saint Agnes Medical Center v. Pacificare of California (2003) 31 Cal.4th 1187. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

Notice Of Hearing On Petition Of Plaintiffs And Cross-Defendants Can Tang Yu, Yan Wang, And Sunway Floors Cabinets Inc. To Compel Arbitration, Consolidate Arbitration Proceedings, And Stay Action Pending Conclusion Of Arbitration
Off Calendar Dec-07-2016 Continued To Dec-14-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: PLAINTIFF CAN YU, YAN WANG, SUNWAY FLOOR CABINETS INC.'s Hearing On Petition To Compel Arbitration, Consolidate Arbitration Proceedings, And Stay Action Pending Conclusion Of Arbitration is Continued to December 14, 2016 on Court's own motion. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

Notice Of Hearing On Petition Of Plaintiffs And Cross-Defendants Can Tang Yu, Yan Wang, And Sunway Floors Cabinets Inc. To Compel Arbitration, Consolidate Arbitration Proceedings, And Stay Action Pending Conclusion Of Arbitration is continued to December 7, 2016. Opposing party is order to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copy of opposition to department 501 no later than November 23, 2106 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. Judge: Suzanne R. Bolanos; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)
